WINDY
INSTRUCTIONS

Ready for an adventure? Explore the different wind farms across the Philippines and discover fun facts about each one! Visit each wind farm on the map to unlock a special badge and become a Certified Wind Farm Discoverer!

Hi! I'm Windy!
Let's explore wind power! 🌬️

The Philippines has windy islands that make clean electricity from moving air. Tap a glowing orange dot to visit each wind farm and collect all the stars! ⭐

Total Wind Power in the Philippines
🌬️Tap a wind turbine icon to explore a wind farm!
Wind farms found: 0/0
🌬️ Meet the Philippine Winds!
Two big winds blow across our islands each year. Tap each one to say hello!
Hi! I’m Sunny! ☀️
I’m the big friendly star that shines over the Philippines every day. Want to know my secrets?
🌟 I’m SO big that more than a MILLION Earths could fit inside me!
🚀 My sunlight zooms across space and takes about 8 minutes to reach you.
🌬️ I help make the WIND! I warm the air, the warm air rises, and — whoosh! — the moving air spins the wind turbines.
🔌 Solar panels drink up my sunshine and turn it into clean electricity — just like wind farms do with the wind!
🌱 I help plants grow big and green, and I give you vitamin D to keep you strong.
😎 Tip: never look straight at me — I’m super bright! Wear your sunnies.

🎉 Congratulations! 🎉
